title: Monthly Sea Fisheries Statistics November 2025
body: "Highlights   The total quantity of landings by UK vessels (tonnes) decreased by 21% (16.9 thousand tonnes) in November 2025 compared to 2024. The value of landings in November 2025 (£134.2m) also decreased by 6% (£8.9 million) compared to November 2024. Landings in November 2025 comprised mostly of Pelagic species (65%) driven by high uptake of Mackerel which are typically targeted in the winter months (January, February, October and November).  "
